title: Cult Stock Showdown: Buy, Sell, or Hold Archer Aviation, Rigetti Computing, SoundHound AI
text: Archer Aviation receives a HOLD (Neutral Rating) despite bullish analyst coverage. Current Price: $6.52/share with Analyst Target of $10.61 implying upside. Analyst Consensus shows two Strong Buys, four Buys, three Holds, and zero Sell ratings. Despite bullish analyst coverage, critical concerns emerge: Severe cash burn with the company burning near $189 million per quarter, Mounting losses with Q1 net loss reaching $217.7 million, Volatile stock with a beta of 3.13 showing high sensitivity to market downturns, and Binary thesis with investment success heavily dependent on FAA certification timing. The analysis emphasizes that the certification path is too binary and cash burn too steep to justify adding to positions before the next FAA milestone. Recent performance has been lackluster, with shares declining 41.6% year-over-year. The recommendation would improve with substantive Phase 4 progress or confirmed paid commercial flights from Archer's Midnight eVTOL aircraft.
